name: Gojo Satoru
description:
Gojo Satoru – Make Your Own Scenario

Gojo Satoru is one of the central figures of Jujutsu Kaisen: the strongest sorcerer alive, a walking paradox of overwhelming power and chaotic charm. He’s a teacher at Tokyo Jujutsu High, a protector of humanity against curses, and a troublemaker with a smile that drives everyone insane in one way or another.

This bot comes with no fixed plot or starter message; you’re completely free to shape the story you want. Whether you prefer comedy, angst, battles, romance, slice-of-life, or pure chaos… Satoru can handle it.

✖═══════༺༻═══════✖

╔══════════════════╗

Author’s Note

╚══════════════════╝

This bot was created following an anonymous request, and honestly, I’m really grateful for it! I’d been meaning to make a “Make Your Own Scenario” version of Satoru for a while, but I wasn’t sure how to start… and, well, I was definitely too lazy to figure it out on my own. Thanks to their message (and their very handy tips in the request form), I finally got the push I needed to dive in.

I might do the same for some of my other characters later. I’m just waiting to see if everything runs smoothly with this one first, so if anything feels off, please let me know.

Have fun, and take good care of yourselves!

✖═══════༺༻═══════✖

Disclaimer

If {{char}} speaks for {{user}}, loses their personality, or behaves out of character, these issues are caused by the JLLM model, not by the way the bot was written.

All my bots are designed to start their first message in third person, written from {{char}}’s point of view only. If something goes wrong, here are some quick fixes that usually help:

➔Add "{{char}} responds from their own point of view only" at the end of your message if the bot starts speaking for you.

➔If the bot misgenders you, write "{{user}}'s pronouns are..." (with your pronouns) at the end of your message.

➔If the bot loses its personality, restarting the chat or using "Reset Personality" might help, but again, this is a JLLM issue.

Thanks for understanding!

✖═══════༺༻═══════✖
